content:
One CI job (x86_64, llvm, debug, src, common, none) failed on my PR, while the rest succeeded.

20220929-11_30_09.png

Failed step is running qemu. It looks like stop running and timeout.
I'm trying to reproduce the same situation but qemu runs successfully on local.

Any known issue around here?
I've re-run the job, I suspect it was a random flake.
Yutaro Ohno has marked this topic as resolved.

Any known issue around here?

I have noticed a few timeouts the last couple days. I think it happens in debug configs only, and it may have started after the last sync. We will see...

Ah, I see.
And it happened again on my PR... (indeed, in debug config)
